turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. My name is Prakash Datar. I had a scan appointment — uh, MRI — for this morning but I missed it. Can I reschedule?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello Prakash ji. No worries. Let me check... yes, I see the MRI slot from this morning. We can reschedule that. Are you available this week still?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Ideally Thursday or Friday. Mornings preferred.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thursday morning at 9:30 AM is open in the radiology department. Shall I book that?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Done. Prakash Datar, Thursday at 9:30 AM for the MRI. Please remember to follow any fasting or prep guidelines mentioned earlier. SMS on its way.
